prompt: You have four cards to a flush after the turn. How many unseen cards complete the flush draw?
why_v1: A flush draw has 9 outs because nine unseen cards of the suit can complete it.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. A flush draw has 9 outs.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Count only the unseen cards of the suit: a flush draw has 9 outs.
